item.title: MACC denies no attempts made to contact ex-Rafizi aide
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The agency says its investigating officers tried to contact James Chai several times, but to no avail.

item.title: Choose your battles in GE16, analyst advises BN
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Afifi Abdul Razak of UUM says the Umno-led coalition should focus on winnable seats instead of simply fielding a large number of candidates.
Matched: parliament(+2), war(+3), election(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: MACC risks creating climate of fear, Woo says over search for Chai
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
DAP Youth chief says conducting investigations in an intimidating manner erodes public confidence in institutions and the unity government.
Matched: corruption(+3), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Ex-Penang rep accuses deputy minister of misleading Parliament on Hindu boards
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Satees Muniandy, who is Urimai secretary, says Hindu endowments fall under the Federal List of the Ninth Schedule to the Federal Constitution.

item.title: Wan Saiful hints at 13 Bersatu MPs joining Hamzah’s new party
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The Tasek Gelugor MP suggests they may do so after Parliament is dissolved since they will no longer be bound by the anti-hopping law.

item.title: Medical tourism keeps Malaysia’s best doctors from leaving
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Rising demand from international patients offers medical specialists new opportunities in the private sector amid a talent shortage in the public sector.

item.title: Zaid’s Borneo bloc comments insulting, reckless, says Sarawak activist

item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today

item.title: Govt should rethink fuel subsidy structure amid Iran conflict, say economists
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Carmelo Ferlito says maintaining the price of subsidised RON95 amid volatile global oil prices means the cost difference must be absorbed by public finances.

item.title: Form RCI over MACC corporate manoeuvres claim, DAP urges govt
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
DAP's top leadership says the government must handle the allegations made in a Bloomberg report effectively to defend MACC's credibility.
Matched: parliament(+2), corruption(+3), ai(+3)
